notes: Visa test card (canonical Stripe test number). Luhn-valid.

Not a credit card: 1234-5678-9012-3456 is NOT Luhn-valid and does not match any credit-card prefix. Detected by the broad computeruse_guard pattern (matches 4x4-digit sequences with optional separators). The Luhn filter only applies to the pii_credit_card category, not computeruse_guard_sensitive. This is intentional: computeruse_guard is a "be paranoid" detector for AI agents.
AWS documentation example key. NOT a real key.
GitHub PAT format. Synthetic, not a real token.
PEM private key marker (partial: the test input omits the leading ----- for brevity). The dist matches the trailing -----BEGIN...----- and returns the partial marker.
